examples: Guns were blazing, flares going up and the sky was lit up all around.
The ship sent up distress flares to attract the attention of the coastguard.
He's got a fiery temper and flares up at the slightest provocation.
It is a question of time before the conflict in Syria flares up again.
Police chief Marcelo Arigony said the band had chosen not to buy more expensive indoor flares.
